title: Grit Studio Run Copy Deploy Boundary
forbids: Studio Run in Game deployment rebuilding the Swooper mod or losing private deployment snapshot evidence
why: Packet 11 makes deployment a copy from the request-local generated mod to the stable Studio-run mod id, with private deployment and snapshot records protected by the active runtime lease.
remediate: Keep Run in Game deploy as deployMod(inputDir: generatedModRoot, modId: mod-swooper-studio-run), thread RunDeployment and DeployedModSnapshot through private runtime diagnostics, and keep Save/Deploy build behavior out of the Run in Game deployment path.
message: Studio Run in Game copy-deploy boundary drifted.
